case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. CECILIO T LIGUID et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP395(B): VENUE OF PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
